title: CONTRIBUTING
text: Small typos grammatical errors documentation may edited directly using GitHub web interface, long changes made source file. YES ✔️: edit roxygen comment .R file R/. ❌: edit .Rd file man/.

title: CONTRIBUTING
text: make substantial pull request, always file issue make sure someone team agrees ’s problem. ’ve found bug, create associated issue illustrate bug minimal reprex.

title: CONTRIBUTING
text: recommend create Git branch pull request (PR). Look R-CMD-check build status . making changes, run devtools::check() ensure new Notes, Warnings Errors appearing. recommend tidyverse style guide. also use styler package apply styles, please don’t restyle code nothing PR. use roxygen2. use testthat. Contributions test cases included easier accept. user-facing changes, add bullet top NEWS.md current development version header describing changes made followed GitHub username, links relevant issue(s)/PR(s).

title: Get started
text: INSPIRE Directive aims create European Union Spatial Data Infrastructure (SDI) EU environmental policies policies activities may affect environment. infrastructure enables public sector organizations share environmental spatial information, facilitates public access spatial information across Europe assists policy-making across boundaries. Source: INSPIRE Knowledge Base. Cadastre Navarre implements INSPIRE directive three services: ATOM service: Downloads complete municipal cadastral datasets. WFS service: Retrieves cadastral features within supplied bounding box. WMS service: Downloads georeferenced map images different cadastral elements. ATOM download WFS query functions return addresses, buildings cadastral parcels sf objects sf package. ATOM index search functions return tibbles. WMS returns georeferenced images SpatRaster objects terra package.

title: Get started
text: example demonstrates main capabilities CatastRoNav recreating cadastral map surroundings El Sadar Stadium. use WMS WFS services retrieve different layers. Figure 1: Cadastral layers around El Sadar Stadium can also create thematic maps attributes spatial objects. example visualizes urban growth Pamplona CatastRoNav, reproducing map Dominic Royé (Royé 2019). First, retrieve geometry Pamplona’s city center mapSpain: Next, retrieve buildings using WFS service: , crop buildings buffer created earlier: Figure 2: Buildings within Pamplona buffer Next, extract construction year beginning column: Finally, group data construction year create visualization. , cut() creates classes decade 1900 onward: Figure 3: Urban growth Pamplona
code: # Retrieve buildings within a bounding box. # Coordinates can be obtained from https://boundingbox.klokantech.com/.  library(CatastRoNav) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(mapSpain) library(sf)  stadium <- catrnav_wfs_get_buildings_bbox(   c(-1.6384926614, 42.7958160568, -1.6354170622, 42.7974640323),   srs = 4326 )  # Transform to the WMS query CRS.  stadium_parcel_pr <- sf::st_transform(stadium, 3857)  # Extract parcel label imagery.  labs <- catrnav_wms_get_layer(   stadium_parcel_pr,   what = "parcel",   srs = 3857 )  # Plot the layers. library(tidyterra) # Plot SpatRaster layers.  ggplot() +   geom_spatraster_rgb(data = labs) +   geom_sf(data = stadium, fill = "red", alpha = .5) +   coord_sf(crs = 25830) # Use mapSpain to obtain the city geometry. pamp <- esp_get_capimun(munic = "^Pamplona")  # Transform to ETRS89 / UTM zone 30N and add a 1,250 m buffer. pamp_buff <- pamp |>   st_transform(25830) |>   st_buffer(1250) pamp_bu <- catrnav_wfs_get_buildings_bbox(pamp_buff, count = 10000) # Crop buildings.  dataviz <- st_intersection(pamp_bu, pamp_buff)  ggplot(dataviz) +   geom_sf() # Extract the first four positions. year <- substr(dataviz$beginning, 1, 4)  # Replace entries that do not look like years with "0000". year[!(year %in% 0:2500)] <- "0000"  # Convert to integer. year <- as.integer(year)  # Add a new column. dataviz <- dataviz |>   mutate(year = year) dataviz <- dataviz |>   mutate(     year_cat = cut(year, breaks = c(0, seq(1900, 2030, by = 10)), dig.lab = 4)   )  # Adjust the color palette.  dataviz_pal <- hcl.colors(length(levels(dataviz$year_cat)), "Spectral")  ggplot(dataviz) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = year_cat), color = NA) +   scale_fill_manual(values = dataviz_pal) +   theme_void() +   labs(title = "PAMPLONA", fill = "") +   theme(     panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black"),     plot.background = element_rect(fill = "black"),     legend.justification = .5,     legend.text = element_text(       colour = "white",       size = 12     ),     plot.title = element_text(       colour = "white", hjust = .5,       margin = margin(t = 30),       size = 30     ),     plot.caption = element_text(       colour = "white",       margin = margin(b = 20), hjust = .5     ),     plot.margin = margin(r = 40, l = 40)   )

title: Get started
text: example demonstrates main capabilities CatastRoNav recreating cadastral map surroundings El Sadar Stadium. use WMS WFS services retrieve different layers. Figure 1: Cadastral layers around El Sadar Stadium
code: # Retrieve buildings within a bounding box. # Coordinates can be obtained from https://boundingbox.klokantech.com/.  library(CatastRoNav) library(dplyr) library(ggplot2) library(mapSpain) library(sf)  stadium <- catrnav_wfs_get_buildings_bbox(   c(-1.6384926614, 42.7958160568, -1.6354170622, 42.7974640323),   srs = 4326 )  # Transform to the WMS query CRS.  stadium_parcel_pr <- sf::st_transform(stadium, 3857)  # Extract parcel label imagery.  labs <- catrnav_wms_get_layer(   stadium_parcel_pr,   what = "parcel",   srs = 3857 )  # Plot the layers. library(tidyterra) # Plot SpatRaster layers.  ggplot() +   geom_spatraster_rgb(data = labs) +   geom_sf(data = stadium, fill = "red", alpha = .5) +   coord_sf(crs = 25830)

title: Get started
text: can also create thematic maps attributes spatial objects. example visualizes urban growth Pamplona CatastRoNav, reproducing map Dominic Royé (Royé 2019). First, retrieve geometry Pamplona’s city center mapSpain: Next, retrieve buildings using WFS service: , crop buildings buffer created earlier: Figure 2: Buildings within Pamplona buffer Next, extract construction year beginning column: Finally, group data construction year create visualization. , cut() creates classes decade 1900 onward: Figure 3: Urban growth Pamplona
code: # Use mapSpain to obtain the city geometry. pamp <- esp_get_capimun(munic = "^Pamplona")  # Transform to ETRS89 / UTM zone 30N and add a 1,250 m buffer. pamp_buff <- pamp |>   st_transform(25830) |>   st_buffer(1250) pamp_bu <- catrnav_wfs_get_buildings_bbox(pamp_buff, count = 10000) # Crop buildings.  dataviz <- st_intersection(pamp_bu, pamp_buff)  ggplot(dataviz) +   geom_sf() # Extract the first four positions. year <- substr(dataviz$beginning, 1, 4)  # Replace entries that do not look like years with "0000". year[!(year %in% 0:2500)] <- "0000"  # Convert to integer. year <- as.integer(year)  # Add a new column. dataviz <- dataviz |>   mutate(year = year) dataviz <- dataviz |>   mutate(     year_cat = cut(year, breaks = c(0, seq(1900, 2030, by = 10)), dig.lab = 4)   )  # Adjust the color palette.  dataviz_pal <- hcl.colors(length(levels(dataviz$year_cat)), "Spectral")  ggplot(dataviz) +   geom_sf(aes(fill = year_cat), color = NA) +   scale_fill_manual(values = dataviz_pal) +   theme_void() +   labs(title = "PAMPLONA", fill = "") +   theme(     panel.background = element_rect(fill = "black"),     plot.background = element_rect(fill = "black"),     legend.justification = .5,     legend.text = element_text(       colour = "white",       size = 12     ),     plot.title = element_text(       colour = "white", hjust = .5,       margin = margin(t = 30),       size = 30     ),     plot.caption = element_text(       colour = "white",       margin = margin(b = 20), hjust = .5     ),     plot.margin = margin(r = 40, l = 40)   )

title: Authors and Citation
text: Diego Hernangómez. Author, maintainer. Francisco J. Goerlich. Contributor.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Hernangómez D (2026). CatastRoNav: Interface INSPIRE Services Cadastre Navarre. doi:10.5281/zenodo.6366407. https://ropenspain.github.io/CatastRoNav/.
code: @Manual{R-catastronav,   title = {{CatastRoNav}: Interface to the INSPIRE Services of the Cadastre of Navarre},   year = {2026},   version = {0.1.0.9000},   author = {Diego Hernangómez},   doi = {10.5281/zenodo.6366407},   url = {https://ropenspain.github.io/CatastRoNav/},   abstract = {Provides access to public spatial data from the Cadastre of Navarre through its INSPIRE ATOM, WFS and WMS services. Supports complete municipal dataset downloads, bounding box feature queries and georeferenced map image downloads for addresses, buildings and cadastral parcels.}, }

title: CatastRoNav
text: CatastRoNav provides access services Cadastre Navarre. CatastRoNav, can retrieve addresses, buildings cadastral parcels INSPIRE ATOM, WFS WMS services.

title: CatastRoNav
text: can install development version CatastRoNav r-universe: Alternatively, install development version GitHub pak package:
code: # Install CatastRoNav from r-universe. install.packages(   "CatastRoNav",   repos = c(     "https://ropenspain.r-universe.dev",     "https://cloud.r-project.org"   ) ) pak::pak("rOpenSpain/CatastRoNav")

title: CatastRoNav
text: Functions CatastRoNav organized source service. Function names follow catrnav_*service*_*description* convention.

title: CatastRoNav
text: CatastRoNav retrieves cadastral data Cadastre Navarre three INSPIRE services:

title: CatastRoNav
text: ATOM service downloads complete municipal datasets addresses, buildings cadastral parcels. Download functions return sf objects sf package. Index search functions return tibbles. functions use catrnav_atom_get_*() prefix.

title: CatastRoNav
text: WFS service retrieves cadastral features within supplied bounding box. Results returned sf objects sf package. full municipal downloads, prefer ATOM service. functions use catrnav_wfs_get_*() prefix.

title: CatastRoNav
text: WMS service downloads georeferenced map images addresses, buildings cadastral parcels. catrnav_wms_get_layer() returns SpatRaster object terra package.

title: CatastRoNav
text: Data provided Government Navarre Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC 4.0) license. service provided “” without warranties kind, either express implied. Data source: SITNA – Government Navarre.

what: Retrieve features with the WFS service
title: CatastRoNav
code: library(CatastRoNav) library(ggplot2)  wfs_get_buildings <- catrnav_wfs_get_buildings_bbox(   c(-1.652563, 42.478016, -1.646919, 42.483333),   srs = 4326 ) # Plot the buildings. ggplot(wfs_get_buildings) +   geom_sf() +   ggtitle("Olite, Navarra")

title: CatastRoNav
text: Downloaded files cached locally. Use catrnav_detect_cache_dir() inspect active cache, catrnav_set_cache_dir() configure catrnav_clear_cache() remove cached data.

Supports complete municipal dataset downloads, bounding box feature queries and georeferenced map image downloads for addresses, buildings and cadastral parcels.}, }

what: ATOM INSPIRE: download all addresses for a municipality — catrnav_atom_get_address
title: ATOM INSPIRE: download all addresses for a municipality — catrnav_atom_get_address
text: Downloads spatial data addresses municipality using ATOM INSPIRE service provided Cadastre Navarre.

title: ATOM INSPIRE: download all addresses for a municipality — catrnav_atom_get_address
code: catrnav_atom_get_address(   munic,   cache = TRUE,   update_cache = FALSE,   cache_dir = NULL,   verbose = FALSE )

title: ATOM INSPIRE: download all addresses for a municipality — catrnav_atom_get_address
text: SITNA – Catastro de Navarra

title: ATOM INSPIRE: download all addresses for a municipality — catrnav_atom_get_address
text: munic Municipality name, partial name cadastral code. Use catrnav_atom_search_munic() search available municipalities. cache logical value indicating whether use cached files. Defaults TRUE. update_cache Logical. cached file refreshed? Defaults FALSE. set TRUE, forces new download. cache_dir Path cache directory. NULL, function stores cached files temporary directory (see base::tempdir()). verbose Logical. TRUE, displays informational messages.

title: ATOM INSPIRE: download all addresses for a municipality — catrnav_atom_get_address
text: sf object, NULL data retrieved.

title: ATOM INSPIRE: download all addresses for a municipality — catrnav_atom_get_address
code: s <- catrnav_atom_get_address("Tudela")  library(ggplot2)  ggplot(s) +   geom_sf() +   labs(     title = "Addresses",     subtitle = "Tudela"   )

title: ATOM INSPIRE: list address download URLs — catrnav_atom_get_address_db_all
text: tibble requested information following columns: munic: Municipality name cadastral code. url: ATOM URL corresponding municipality. date: Reference date data.

title: ATOM INSPIRE: list address download URLs — catrnav_atom_get_address_db_all
code: catrnav_atom_get_address_db_all() #> # A tibble: 272 × 3 #>    munic                            url                               date       #>    <chr>                            <chr>                             <date>     #>  1 001 Abáigar                      https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #>  2 002 Abárzuza / Abartzuza         https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #>  3 003 Abaurregaina / Abaurrea Alta https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #>  4 004 Abaurrepea / Abaurrea Baja   https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #>  5 005 Aberin                       https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #>  6 006 Ablitas                      https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #>  7 007 Adiós                        https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #>  8 008 Aguilar de Codés             https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #>  9 009 Aibar / Oibar                https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #> 10 010 Altsasu / Alsasua            https://filescartografia.navarra… 2026-04-14 #> # ℹ 262 more rows

what: Clear your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_clear_cache
title: Clear your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_clear_cache
text: Use function caution. clears cached data configuration, specifically: Deletes CatastRoNav configuration directory (tools::R_user_dir("CatastRoNav", "config")). Deletes cache_dir directory. Clears CATASTRONAV_CACHE_DIR environment variable.

title: Clear your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_clear_cache
code: catrnav_clear_cache(config = FALSE, cached_data = TRUE, verbose = FALSE)

title: Clear your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_clear_cache
text: config logical value indicating whether delete CatastRoNav configuration directory. cached_data TRUE, deletes cache_dir contents. verbose Logical. TRUE, displays informational messages.

title: Clear your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_clear_cache
text: NULL, invisibly. function called side effects.

title: Clear your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_clear_cache
text: function resets cache state never used CatastRoNav.

title: Clear your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_clear_cache
code: # Caution! This modifies your current state. # \dontrun{ my_cache <- catrnav_detect_cache_dir() #> ℹ /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/CatastRoNav  example_cache <- file.path(tempdir(), "example", "cache") catrnav_set_cache_dir(example_cache, verbose = FALSE)  catrnav_clear_cache(verbose = TRUE) #> ! Deleted CatastRoNav cached data from /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/example/cache ("0 bytes").  # Restore the initial cache. catrnav_set_cache_dir(my_cache) #> ℹ CatastRoNav cache directory is /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/CatastRoNav. #> ℹ To reuse this cache directory in future sessions, set `install` to `TRUE`. identical(my_cache, catrnav_detect_cache_dir()) #> ℹ /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/CatastRoNav #> [1] TRUE # }

what: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
title: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
text: Configures cache directory used CatastRoNav. Use Sys.getenv("CATASTRONAV_CACHE_DIR") catrnav_detect_cache_dir() inspect current path.

title: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
code: catrnav_set_cache_dir(   cache_dir = NULL,   overwrite = FALSE,   install = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )  catrnav_detect_cache_dir()

title: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
text: cache_dir Path cache directory. NULL, function stores cached files temporary directory (see base::tempdir()). overwrite logical value indicating whether overwrite existing CATASTRONAV_CACHE_DIR value. install Logical. TRUE, installs key local machine use future sessions. Defaults FALSE. cache_dir FALSE, argument set FALSE automatically. verbose Logical. TRUE, displays informational messages.

title: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
text: catrnav_set_cache_dir() invisibly returns cache path character string. primarily called side effect. catrnav_detect_cache_dir() returns cache path used current session.

title: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
text: default, cache_dir set, CatastRoNav uses directory inside base::tempdir(). Files directory temporary removed R session ends. persist cache across R sessions, use catrnav_set_cache_dir(cache_dir, install = TRUE). writes chosen path configuration file tools::R_user_dir("CatastRoNav", "config").

title: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
text: configuration location moved rappdirs::user_config_dir("CatastRoNav", "R") tools::R_user_dir("CatastRoNav", "config"). Existing configuration files migrated automatically. migration message shown .

title: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
text: Source files cached download. CatastRoNav implements following caching options: occasional use, rely default tempdir()-based cache without installing persistent path. Modify cache single session setting catrnav_set_cache_dir(cache_dir = "/path/"). reproducible workflows, install persistent cache catrnav_set_cache_dir(cache_dir = "/path/", install = TRUE). cache kept across R sessions. cache specific files elsewhere, use cache_dir argument corresponding function. Cached files can occasionally become corrupt. case, download data setting update_cache = TRUE corresponding function. download fails, use verbose = TRUE inspect request catrnav_detect_cache_dir() identify active cache path.

title: Set your CatastRoNav cache directory — catrnav_set_cache_dir
code: # Caution! This modifies your current state. # \dontrun{ my_cache <- catrnav_detect_cache_dir() #> ℹ /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/CatastRoNav  example_cache <- file.path(tempdir(), "example", "cache") catrnav_set_cache_dir(example_cache) #> ℹ CatastRoNav cache directory is /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/example/cache. #> ℹ To reuse this cache directory in future sessions, set `install` to `TRUE`.  catrnav_detect_cache_dir() #> ℹ /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/example/cache #> [1] "/tmp/Rtmp702kUL/example/cache"  # Restore the initial cache. catrnav_set_cache_dir(my_cache) #> ℹ CatastRoNav cache directory is /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/CatastRoNav. #> ℹ To reuse this cache directory in future sessions, set `install` to `TRUE`. identical(my_cache, catrnav_detect_cache_dir()) #> ℹ /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/CatastRoNav #> [1] TRUE # }  catrnav_detect_cache_dir() #> ℹ /tmp/Rtmp702kUL/CatastRoNav #> [1] "/tmp/Rtmp702kUL/CatastRoNav"

title: WFS INSPIRE: retrieve addresses — catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox
text: Retrieves spatial address data Cadastre Navarre WFS INSPIRE service. catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox() retrieves features within supplied bounding box. See Bounding box.

title: WFS INSPIRE: retrieve addresses — catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox
code: catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox(x, srs = 4326, verbose = FALSE, count = NULL)

title: WFS INSPIRE: retrieve addresses — catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox
text: SITNA – Catastro de Navarra

title: WFS INSPIRE: retrieve addresses — catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox
text: x See Bounding box. Can one : numeric vector length 4 coordinates define bounding box: c(xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax). sf/sfc object, provided sf package. srs CRS use query. Defaults 4326. See Bounding box. verbose Logical. TRUE, displays informational messages. count Positive whole number specifying maximum number features return. NULL, service default applies.

title: WFS INSPIRE: retrieve addresses — catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox
text: sf object, NULL data retrieved.

title: WFS INSPIRE: retrieve addresses — catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox
text: service returns maximum 5,000 features default. Use count request smaller result.

title: WFS INSPIRE: retrieve addresses — catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox
text: x numeric vector, make sure srs matches coordinate values. function queries bounding box EPSG:25830, ETRS89 / UTM zone 30N, transforms result back srs. x sf sfc object, srs ignored. object's bounding box used query result transformed back input CRS. See sf::st_bbox().

title: WMS INSPIRE: download georeferenced map images — catrnav_wms_get_layer
text: Downloads georeferenced map images Cadastre Navarre WMS service. function wraps mapSpain::esp_get_tiles().

title: WMS INSPIRE: download georeferenced map images — catrnav_wms_get_layer
code: catrnav_wms_get_layer(   x,   srs = 4326,   what = c("building", "parcel", "address"),   styles = c("default", "ELFCadastre"),   update_cache = FALSE,   cache_dir = NULL,   verbose = FALSE,   crop = FALSE,   options = NULL,   ... )

title: WMS INSPIRE: download georeferenced map images — catrnav_wms_get_layer
text: SITNA – Catastro de Navarra

title: WMS INSPIRE: download georeferenced map images — catrnav_wms_get_layer
text: x See Bounding box. Can one : numeric vector length 4 coordinates define bounding box: c(xmin, ymin, xmax, ymax). sf/sfc object, provided sf package. srs CRS use query. Defaults 4326. See Bounding box. WMS layer download. See Layers styles. styles Style apply selected WMS layer. See Layers styles. update_cache Logical. cached file refreshed? Defaults FALSE. set TRUE, forces new download. cache_dir Path cache directory. NULL, function stores cached files temporary directory (see base::tempdir()). verbose Logical. TRUE, displays informational messages. crop Logical. TRUE, crop results specified x extent. x sf object one POINT, crop set FALSE. See terra::crop(). options named list containing additional options pass query. ... Arguments passed mapSpain::esp_get_tiles res Character string number. valid WMS providers. Resolution (pixels) final tile. bbox_expand Number. Expansion percentage bounding box x. transparent Logical. Whether use transparent background, supported. mask Logical. TRUE mask result x. See terra::mask().

title: WMS INSPIRE: download georeferenced map images — catrnav_wms_get_layer
text: SpatRaster three RGB four RGBA layers, NULL request completed. See terra::RGB().

title: WMS INSPIRE: download georeferenced map images — catrnav_wms_get_layer
text: x numeric vector, make sure srs matches coordinate values. x sf sfc object, srs ignored. query uses EPSG:3857, Web Mercator, transforms image back input CRS. image appears distorted, provide spatial object x set srs CRS requested image.

title: WMS INSPIRE: download georeferenced map images — catrnav_wms_get_layer
text: argument selects one following API layers: "parcel": CP.CadastralParcel. "building": BU.Building. "address": AD.Address.

title: WMS INSPIRE: download georeferenced map images — catrnav_wms_get_layer
text: WMS service provides different styles layer (argument). Available styles include: "parcel": "default" "ELFCadastre". "building": "default". "address": "default".

Selecting layers 1, 2, and 3.  # }

title: Decide whether an example should run — run_example

title: Decide whether an example should run — run_example

title: CatastRoNav (development version)
text: package now licensed GPL-2. Data Government Navarre remain available CC 4.0. User-facing messages now use cli consistent, informative output. refactor completed AI assistance reviewed package maintainer. Network requests now use httr2 retries. Use options(catastronav_timeout = 300) set timeout options(catastronav_ssl_verify = 1L) control SSL verification. settings fall back catastro_timeout catastro_ssl_verify, respectively. Requests now detect offline sessions downloading failed requests return NULL instead stopping execution. Spatial files now use UTF-8 normalization strategy CatastRo, removing stringi dependency avoiding lossy transliteration. Spatial results now valid geometries, UTF-8 metadata normalized CRS definitions EPSG code available. minimum supported R version now 4.1.0. catrnav_atom_get_address() catrnav_atom_get_address_db_all() catrnav_atom_get_buildings() catrnav_atom_get_buildings_db_all() Added WMS INSPIRE support catrnav_wms_get_layer() using mapSpain terra. retrieves address, building cadastral parcel layers, supports ELFCadastre parcel style accepts additional mapSpain request settings options. Offline failed requests return NULL. Adapted vignette Quarto. catrnav_atom_get_address(), catrnav_atom_get_buildings() catrnav_atom_get_parcels() now select closest municipality pattern matches multiple names report alternatives. Calls cache = FALSE use temporary files invalid arguments produce informative errors. catrnav_atom_search_munic() now searches ATOM index municipality name cadastral code returns matches ordered proximity. catrnav_clear_cache() now validates arguments reports size deleted cached data verbose = TRUE. catrnav_detect_cache_dir() now reports active cache directory. catrnav_set_cache_dir() now defaults cache_dir NULL, validates arguments stores persistent configuration tools::R_user_dir(). Existing configuration migrated automatically previous location reliably restored later sessions. Set cache_dir = FALSE use nonpersistent temporary cache even install = TRUE. catrnav_wfs_get_address_bbox(), catrnav_wfs_get_buildings_bbox() catrnav_wfs_get_parcels_bbox() now default srs 4326, validate bounding boxes, CRS values count use CatastRo::inspire_wfs_get() requests. Set options(catastronav_wfs_limit_km2 = ...) warn query exceeds chosen area square kilometers. default Inf disables warning. run_example() now determines whether network-dependent examples run based CRAN status network availability.

title: CatastRoNav 0.1.0
text: Improved condition handling. Added count argument sets maximum number features returned. Added support ATOM cadastral parcels. See catrnav_atom_get_parcels(). ATOM capabilities added Cadastre Navarre makes available. Added caching system. See catrnav_set_cache_dir() catrnav_detect_cache_dir(). Added rappdirs dependency.

title: CatastRoNav 0.0.2
text: Made sf objects valid sf::st_make_valid().

title: CatastRoNav 0.0.1
text: Initial release.

title: CatastRoNav 0.0.0.9000
text: pre-release. Added NEWS.md file track changes package. Added DOI: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6366407.
